title: Shinyanga Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charge) Order, 2002
title_en: Shinyanga Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charge) Order, 2002

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as Shinyanga Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charge) Order, 2002.

An Order is hereby issued by the Managing Director that the charge prescribed in the Schedule to this Order shall come into operation on 1 st day of July, 2002. Schedule A. Metered rates No. Category Present rates TShs/m 3 New rates with effect from 1/7/2002 TShs/m 3 1 Domestic 180.00 300.00 2 Commercial 560.00 560.00 3 Institution 240.00 350.00 4 Industrial 560.00 560.00 B. Unmetered customs minimum flat rates No. Category Present rates TShs/month New rates with effect from 1/7/2002 TShs/month 1. Domestic 3,870.00 5,000.00 2. Commercial 5,152.00 15,000.00 3. Institution 3,870.00 10,000.00 4. Industrial 5,152.00 15,000.00 C. Meter rents No. Meter size Old rates TShs/month New rates with effect from 1/7/2002 TShs/month 1. ½” Diameter 500.00 1,000.00 2. ¾” Diameter 1,000.00 1,000.00 3. 1” Diameter 1,500.00 1,000.00 4. 1½” Diameter 2,000.00 2,000.00 5. 2” Diameter 2,500.00 2,000.00 D. Reconnection charges No. Category Present rates TShs/month New rates with effect from 1/7/2002 TShs/month 1. Domestic 15,000.00 5,000.00 2. Commercial 15,000.00 10,000.00 3. Institution 10,000.00 10,000.00 4. Industrial 20,000.00 10,000.00 E. Connection charges 25% of total material cost History of this document 19 July 2002 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 29 01 July 2002 Commenced 29 June 2002 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
